# 🌐 Third-Party Skills

Skills cloned or adapted from external sources — other open-source repos, community contributions, or vendor-provided agent instructions.

```
third-party/
└── cloned-skill/
    ├── SKILL.md          # The skill itself
    ├── README.md         # Attribution + usage notes
    └── LICENSE           # Original license (must be preserved)
```

**Rules:**
- Always preserve the original LICENSE and attribution
- Note the source repo URL in the README
- If you modify a third-party skill, document what changed
